sglang.title: filter by num_hidden_layers
sglang.author: pansicheng
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In constrained GPU memory environments (e.g., low-end GPUs), we may need to reduce the number of layers to avoid out-of-memory errors while still validating model functionality. This PR allows us to load only user-specified num_hidden_layers (instead of the full model's layer count).

Mod

vllm.title: use base version for version comparison
vllm.author: BoyuanFeng
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
#18846 turns standalone_compile on by default via is_torch_equal_or_newer("2.8.0"). One major motivation is to use standalone_compile for vllm x torch nightly CI tests.
However, it has no effect yet. The current torch nightly gives 2.8.0a0+... which is a pre-release and is considered to be less than

vllm.title: [torch.compile] reorganize the cache directory to support compiling multiple models
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: #17211 explores the possibility of compiling multiple models in the same process, i.e. both the main model and the eagle head model. However, it does this by extending the compilation cache directory in a tricky way. In addition, that integration can be problematic when we compile for specific shape

vllm.title: [BugFix] Honor `enable_caching` in connector-delayed kvcache load case
vllm.author: njhill

vllm.title: [Model] Fix minimax model cache & lm_head precision
vllm.author: qscqesze
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Change the precision of the MiniMax model in vLLM: update the LM head and KV cache from bfloat16 (bf16) to float32 (fp32).
Purpose: To improve numerical stability and output accuracy during inference.

vllm.title: [Refactor] Remove unused variables in `moe_permute_unpermute_kernel.inl`
vllm.author: yewentao256
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Remove unused variables in moe_permute_unpermute_kernel.inl
So we don't have warnings like
moe_permute_unpermute_kernel.inl(23): warning #177-D: variable "align_expanded_row_accumulate" was declared but never referenced
    int64_t align_expanded_row_accumulate = 0;

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix DP Coordinator incorrect debug log message
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
We were logging "Moving DP wave from N to N" instead of "Moving DP wave from N to (N + 1)".
Also included some minor adjacent code improvements.
Thanks to @SageMoore for discovering this.

vllm.title: [V1][Metrics] Deprecate metrics with gpu_ prefix for non GPU specific metrics.
vllm.author: sahelib25
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR deprecates metrics with gpu_ prefix for existing non-GPU specific metrics-

gpu_cache_usage
gpu_prefix_cache_queries
gpu_prefix_cache_hits

and, introduce new metrics after renaming-

kv_cache_usage
prefix_cache_queries
prefix_cache_hits
